sections.paragraph:
-

(1) verbal adj. born, especially in the phrase יְלִיד בַּיִת “(a slave) born in the house of his owner,” verna, Arab. وَلِيدُ, تَلِيدُ id. Gen 14:14 17:12 , 13 Gen 17:13, 23 Gen 17:23 Lev 22:11.

(2) subst. a son; יְלִידֵי הָעֲנָק the sons of Anak, Num 13:22, 28 Num 13:28יְלִידֵי הָֽרָפָה 2Sa 21:16, 18 2Sa 21:18, the sons of Raphah, i.q. רְפָאִים.
